text.title: array-items-wrapper-extraction Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for array-items-wrapper-extraction. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: For variable-cardinality extraction, declare the top-level schema as an object with at least items: list[Entity], total_found: int, and truncated: bool. Never return a bare list as the top-level structured-output type.
rule.rationale: OpenAI/Azure strict mode rejects top-level arrays because additionalProperties only applies to objects. On other providers, list[Entity] collapses zero/one/many into inconsistent shapes ([], null, single dict, [ent], ent). The wrapper standardises the shape and exposes hooks for count and truncation diagnostics.
